decisions.decision: Use `settings` field name in app_settings.fixed[] (not `value` per CONTEXT D-01)
decisions.rationale: writer.ts:177 reads row.settings; D-01 wording was a draft typo. Documented in PATTERNS.md + RESEARCH §Pitfall 2
RESEARCH Q1 RESOLVED — last-write-wins semantics unchanged; readability in DB + teardown logs improved
RESEARCH Q2 RESOLVED — Pitfall 3 mitigation; merge_jsonb_column doesn't delete keys not in payload, so strict toEqual would fail on stale state

decisions.decision: Commit post-v2.6 baseline JSON + diff.md unconditionally regardless of PARITY GATE verdict
decisions.rationale: RESEARCH Q4 RESOLVED — artifact is evidence regardless; milestone close decision is upstream

decisions.decision: Residual budget definition: small = single-file AND <50 LoC AND isolated root cause; cap at 2-3 fixes; outside triple escalates
decisions.rationale: RESEARCH Q3 RESOLVED — D-07 budget; prevents scope creep during greening

decisions.decision: Defer 63-03 manual parity gate run to user; stop autonomous loop without lifecycle
decisions.rationale: User explicit choice 2026-04-25 — autonomous can't spin up Supabase + dev server + 15min Playwright run
